headline: NetApp and Commvault Advance Cyber Resilience with Strategic Alliance
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., March 24, 2026--NetApp® (NASDAQ: NTAP), the Intelligent Data Infrastructure company, and Commvault (NASDAQ: CVLT), a leader in unified resilience at enterprise scale, today announced a strategic alliance to deliver a powerful, integrated solution for enterprise data protection and cyber resilience. headline: NetApp and Elastio Announce Partnership to Deliver Defense-in-Depth Ransomware Resilience
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif. & SAN FRANCISCO, March 24, 2026--NetApp® (NASDAQ: NTAP), the Intelligent Data Infrastructure company, and Elastio are helping enterprises enhance their cyber resilience with a layered defense that extends from production storage into recovery data. Security teams must be ready to address threats at every layer of their technology stack, including ransomware that moved quietly through production before it was caught that now lives inside snapshots and backups. Advanced ransomware
